hooks.command:
INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$CMD" in *'git commit'*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; SRC=index; STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- renv.lock 2>/dev/null); if printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qE 'commit[^|;&]*(-[a-zA-Z]*a|--all)'; then if [ -n "$(git diff --name-only -- renv.lock 2>/dev/null)" ]; then STAGED=renv.lock; SRC=worktree; fi; fi; [ -z "$STAGED" ] && exit 0; OLD=$(git show HEAD:renv.lock 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.Packages | to_entries[] | "\(.key) \(.value.Version)"' | sort); if [ "$SRC" = worktree ]; then NEW=$(jq -r '.Packages | to_entries[] | "\(.key) \(.value.Version)"' renv.lock 2>/dev/null | sort); else NEW=$(git show :renv.lock 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.Packages | to_entries[] | "\(.key) \(.value.Version)"' | sort); fi; CHANGES=$(diff <(printf '%s
' "$OLD") <(printf '%s
' "$NEW") | grep '^[<>]' | sed 's/^< /- /; s/^> /+ /' | head -50); [ -z "$CHANGES" ] && CHANGES='(no package-level changes; repos/metadata diff only)'; REASON=$(printf 'This commit includes renv.lock. Package changes vs HEAD (-: removed/old, +: added/new):
%s
Note: renv.config.auto.snapshot = TRUE may have updated renv.lock without an explicit renv::snapshot(). Approve only after reviewing.' "$CHANGES"); jq -n --arg r "$REASON" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "ask", permissionDecisionReason: $r}}'
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath'); echo "$FILE" | grep -iqE '\.(R|r|qmd)$' && command -v air >/dev/null 2>&1 && air format "$FILE" 2>&1 || true

command -v Rscript >/dev/null 2>&1 && Rscript -e 'if (file.exists("renv/activate.R") && requireNamespace("renv", quietly = TRUE)) { status <- renv::status(); if (!isTRUE(status$synchronized)) message("renv drift detected: run renv::status() for details") }' 2>&1 || true

language: Use Japanese for chat conversations, English for writing files
